description: QA test vehicles for tire-size-gate audit (2026-05-03)

testCases.expectedBehavior: Should show single tire size (likely 255/40R19 or 265/40R19)
testCases.issue: If showing multiple sizes (18/19/20), likely fell back to model-level data

testCases.expectedBehavior: Should show XLT-specific tire sizes only
testCases.issue: If showing all F-150 sizes (17-22), likely model-level fallback

testCases.expectedBehavior: SE has specific wheel size, should not show LE/XLE sizes
testCases.issue: Camry LE is 17, SE is 19 - if both shown, fallback issue

testCases.expectedBehavior: XLE has specific 18 or 20 depending on package

testCases.issue: If showing all Silverado sizes, model-level fallback

testCases.expectedBehavior: Sport has 19 wheels, should not show LX 17 sizes
testCases.issue: If 17 and 19 both shown, fallback issue

verificationSteps: 1. Start dev server: npm run dev
2. For each test case, navigate to /tires?year=X&make=Y&model=Z&modification=TRIM
4. Verify debug.exactTrimMatch is true for trim-specific data
5. If debug.exactTrimMatch is false, the wheel size gate may be shown incorrectly
